themes.exampleQuote: A little bit of Paris in Pittsburgh.
The seasonal La Ruche might be the best dessert I have ever had.
You can call ahead if you know what you want. It is busy on weekends.
Travel everywhere, eat anything. This place was the find of Pittsburgh!
Nut and chocolate croissants that were all fantastic.

notable_quote: The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently land on the pastry quality — croissants, cream puffs, the La Ruche — as genuinely French in execution; the one recurring undercurrent is weekend crowding and occasional stock anxiety, surfaced by the question about the délice de pistache still being available.
quarter_narrative: Twenty-six creators filmed La Gourmandine Lawrenceville this quarter. The bakery filmed none of it back. That gap — 109,267 TikTok plays generated entirely by outside voices, zero posts from the business's own Instagram in the last 40 days — is the defining story of its Spring 2026. The infrastructure is flawless: 1,294 reviews at 88% five-star, a perfect conversion path, and a visual catalog that holds even against the family median. But in a Pittsburgh Sweets cohort where Page's is climbing on social momentum alone, La Gourmandine is holding rank on reputation while the city does its marketing for it. The gap between creator coverage and owned signal is what separates #1 in Bakeries from a real push at the Sweets category, where it currently sits last.
tldr_read: Twenty-six TikTok creators, 109K plays, and zero Instagram posts in 40 days — the city's attention is here, the business's own voice isn't. #1 in Pittsburgh Bakeries, #8 in Pittsburgh Sweets.
tldr_meaning: The review base and visual catalog are already at or above the family median; the only axis separating this business from the top half of Pittsburgh Sweets is whether the Instagram signal restarts and captures even a fraction of the creator attention already circling it.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Twenty-Six Creators Are Filming This Place, And The Place Is Filming None Of It Back.

playbook.headline: Break the 40-day Instagram silence
playbook.action: Post one reel — a lamination pull, a morning case setup, the La Ruche plated — before this quarter closes. The account has not posted in 40 days while creators are actively generating plays.

playbook.headline: Surface the creators already filming you
playbook.action: Repost or story-share from the 26 creators who generated 109K plays this quarter; @lilbigbackz alone pulled 23,700. The content exists and is finding Pittsburgh — the bakery just isn't connected to any of it.

playbook.headline: Anchor the seasonal menu in reviews
playbook.action: The La Ruche and délice de pistache are generating the strongest individual review language; a prompt or in-store cue asking regulars to name the item they'd miss most could sharpen sentiment specificity and lift the review signal closer to the 83-point family median.
